body: [{"ac":1,"text":"`fiz models` against a real fizeau install with multiple providers prints a tabular view with PROVIDER MODEL FAMILY VERSION TIER POWER COST/M STATUS QUOTA AUTO columns.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":2,"text":"`fiz models --json` emits the snapshot as JSON.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":3,"text":"`fiz models \u003cprovider\u003e/\u003cid\u003e` shows detail view.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":4,"text":"`fiz models \u003cshortform\u003e` resolves to detail view if unique, lists candidates if ambiguous.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":5,"text":"Default filter rules suppress noise; `--include-noise` shows all.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":6,"text":"`fiz cache prune` removes data files for sources not in current config.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":7,"text":"`fiz models --refresh` triggers synchronous refresh.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":8,"text":"FEAT-006 updated to document the new subcommands.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false},{"ac":9,"text":"`go test ./cmd/fiz/...` passes.","kind":"build-gate","verifiable":true},{"ac":10,"text":"`go vet ./...` passes.","kind":"prose","verifiable":false}]
